contact.address: 750 Fifth Avenue, Suite 1200, New York, NY 10019

about.subtitle: THE LEGACY
about.title: The Art of Royal Celebration
about.highlight: At Imperial Moments, we believe that life's grandest milestones deserve to be staged with royal majesty, absolute precision, and timeless luxury.
about.paragraph1: Born out of a passion for luxury hospitality and grand ballrooms, Imperial Moments is the premier event planning concierge for high-end weddings, prestigious corporate galas, and exclusive VIP private experiences. We curate bespoke events worldwide, transforming visions into breathtaking realities.
about.paragraph2: Every centerpiece, every candlelight shimmer, and every performance is hand-curated. With an elite registry of vendors, global destination access, and dedicated styling consultants, we guarantee an affair that is prestigious, unforgettable, and entirely yours.

services.title: Royal Wedding Planning
services.text: Bespoke wedding curations with regal grand setups, designer styling, and seamless coordinate flows.

services.title: Destination Weddings
services.text: Exquisite coordination of overseas weddings in French Châteaux, Italian villas, or private islands.

services.title: Corporate Events
services.text: Prestigious galas, elite awards nights, executive conferences, and grand brand launching ceremonies.

services.title: Luxury Birthdays
services.text: Milestone birthday affairs custom-tailored around ultra-luxurious, creative theatrical themes.

services.title: Engagement Ceremonies
services.text: Intimate yet grand gatherings to announce forever, set in highly dramatic and romantic spaces.

services.title: VIP Private Events
services.text: Highly exclusive events where absolute discretion and custom luxury are non-negotiable details.

services.title: Event Décor & Styling
services.text: Bespoke lighting, floral installations, luxury drapery, table curation, and floral arches.

services.title: Entertainment & Artists
services.text: Curating elite violinists, opera stars, international DJs, and acrobats for magnificent displays.

testimonials.text: "Imperial Moments orchestrated our destination wedding in Normandy. It was nothing short of a fairy tale. The gold styling, the chandelier layout, and their concierge's support for our guests was simply immaculate. Pure royal class!"
testimonials.author: Lady Eleanor & Lord George
testimonials.title: Normandy Chateau Wedding

testimonials.text: "The annual corporate anniversary awards dinner we hosted needed to breathe prestige. Victoria Sterling and her event squad styled the hall in high-end charcoal and metallic gold drapes. The sound system and security were flawlessly coordinated. A spectacular success."
testimonials.author: Jonathan Hayes
testimonials.title: CEO, Vanguard Global Capital

testimonials.text: "For my wife's 50th birthday gala, Imperial Moments designed a private island garden masquerade. The sheer attention to detailed floral installations and the violinists they brought from Salzburg left our guests spellbound. Truly master designers."
testimonials.author: Maximilian Vane
testimonials.title: Private Island Estate Gala
